_notes.token_expires: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the Canvas token expires. The dashboard shows a banner if this is within 14 days or in the past. Update this when you regenerate the token.
_notes.canvas_token: On GitHub Actions, comes from the CANVAS_TOKEN secret — leave this placeholder. For local runs, paste your token here (config.json is gitignored).
_notes.canvas_term_name: Must exactly match the term name Canvas returns. View /api/v1/courses?include[]=term to verify.
_notes.excluded_course_ids: Canvas course IDs to skip — e.g. Student Center pseudo-courses that show up as enrolled but aren't real classes.
_notes.included_course_ids: If set (e.g. [8851, 8868, 8857, 8897, 8908]), ONLY these courses are synced. Use this if term filtering isn't enough.
_notes.start_date: The MONDAY of Week 1. Used to compute which week each due date falls into.
